headings.text: SAVANT Reveals New Premium Proseo GE Smart Lighting And Shading Solutions
SAVANT Reveals New Premium Proseo GE Smart Lighting And Shading Solutions

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingSAVANT Reveals New Premium Proseo GE Smart Lighting And Shading SolutionsPosted on March 19, 2025SAVANT Reveals New Premium Proseo GE Smart Lighting And Shading SolutionsAlso showcases Siri voice Integration and groundbreaking smart power solutionTWICE Staff ⋅ Published: February 25, 2025‍(image credit: Savant)‍Savant Systems, Inc., parent of GE Lighting, a Savant company, and a global leader in smart home and power has unveiled its latest residential professional innovation, the GE Proseo smart lighting and shading solutions at the 2025 IBS show at booth #W4701, February 25-27 in Las Vegas, NV.GE Proseo lighting and shades are designed specifically for the professional installation channel and synthesize the brand recognition and trust of GE with the prowess of Savant’s luxury-smart home control. The initial portfolio includes smart and manual shades, keypads, and panelized lighting which are available through Savant’s network of smart home professionals.“We continue to innovate in the smart home and power spaces, bringing in-demand and valuable solutions to our authorized dealer network and their customers,” said JC Murphy, Chief Marketing Officer at Savant. “By expanding our GE smart home portfolio, adding the convenience of Siri voice control, and introducing a cutting-edge smart power panel solution, we are launching industry firsts that continue to push the boundaries of what’s possible.”The Proseo’s beautiful and energy-efficient lighting will enable the personalized ambiance traditional lighting cannot replicate. Together with the Savant app, the family of keypads and dimmers deliver exceptional light quality and extraordinary flexibility to create the perfect vibe in any space. Proseo shades combine modern architectural aesthetics, performance fabrics, and unmatched control interface options to complement any luxury space. Versatile hardware options conceal unsightly wires and screws for a streamlined look that blends with any décor and complements the growing demand for window walls, floor-to-ceiling corner windows, and more.‍(image credit: Savant)‍Additionally, Savant will be showcasing the integration of Apple’s Siri voice control into its platforms at IBS, giving attendees a first look at how Savant’s Native Siri and Apple Shortcuts integration ushers in a new era of smart home innovation, delivering sophisticated and secure voice control of smart home features. The all-new hands-free functionality provides additional value to Apple users at home or on the go.‍Savant Smart Budget Upgrades Home(image credit: Savant)‍The trend towards the electrification of homes for energy savings and harmful emission reduction continues to intensify. The Savant Smart Budget is an affordable alternative solution that consists of Savant Power Modules that can be added to an existing electrical panel, as well as software that regulates the power output of the electrical panel, so the demand never exceeds a home’s capacity.Homeowners interact with Smart Budget through the Savant app and can easily prioritize how and when power is used in the home by monitoring live consumption, shedding unnecessary loads, and balancing usage within a limited electrical service.Savant Smart Budget starts at $1,500 and will be available in Q2, 2025 through Savant’s network of smart home and energy professionals.‍‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍‍Services:Home
